Release AAB build requested: 2026-07-10T19:30:00Z (v1.2.0 — new game release, r1: "זהו את הפתגם" proverbs rebus game)
version: 1.2.0 (build name 1.2.0; versionCode = build-aab run number, strictly increasing)
signing: Play upload key SHA-1 EA:3B (from UPLOAD_* secrets / embedded)
package: com.whoisthere.app (matches Play Console)
note: v1.2.0 — NEW GAME "זהו את הפתגם" (proverbs rebus): 38 baked Hebrew
  proverbs with Pixar-style 3D riddle images, rides the full heat
  infrastructure (tile reveal, letter-bank guessing raised to 24 slots for
  proverbs, scoring, bots, chat, skip vote, interlude). Fixed 3-round heat,
  home 🧩 button with random(2/3/4)/friends sheet, quick-match pool separated
  from image games (+ fix: image-game quick match no longer lands in letters
  duels), rematch keeps the proverbs category. Everything from v1.1.1 r6
  (baked skins, slimmer store, grand-finale win effect, keyboard fix, real
  ads) is included — this branch supersedes it.
note2: versionCode auto = build-aab run number (31 used by v1.1.1 r6).
trigger: r1 dispatch via session-branch push (MCP workflow_dispatch lacks actions:write)
